$schema.description: Reference to the JSON schema file used for validation and editor hinting.

file.description: Should we log into an unique scripts/maps/store/bts_rc.log file? the file is restored every map start.

melee_weapons_pull.description: Allow melee weapons to pull allied players.

melee_weapons_pull_force.description: Force of push if melee_weapons_pull is true

melee_weapons_push.description: Allow melee weapons to push enemies.

melee_weapons_push_force.description: Force of push if melee_weapons_push is true

blood_splash.description: Enable extra blood effects on hit.

sparks_splash.description: Enable spark effects when hitting armored enemies.

m249_knockback.description: Enable M249 SAW knockback recoil pushing the player backward.

flashlight_capacity.description: Quantity of ammo carry for flashlight weapons

flashlight_ammount.description: Quantity of ammo carry for flashlight weapons

bloodpuddle.title: Blood puddles
bloodpuddle.description: Controls blood puddle behavior and appearance.

persistent.description: If true, puddles remain indefinitely until the map is about at 100 free entity slots. Otherwise they fade out as soon as the monster owner disappears.

default_size.description: Random size range for puddles (min, max).

dynamic_ammo.description: Scales ammo pickup amounts based on connected player count.

9mm.description: List of [min, max] where min is given at full server and max is given solo.

357.description: List of [min, max] where min is given at full server and max is given solo.

556.description: List of [min, max] where min is given at full server and max is given solo.

buckshot.description: List of [min, max] where min is given at full server and max is given solo.

ARgrenades.description: List of [min, max] where min is given at full server and max is given solo.

38.description: List of [min, max] where min is given at full server and max is given solo.

bts_flare.description: List of [min, max] where min is given at full server and max is given solo.

bts_battery.description: List of [min, max] where min is given at full server and max is given solo

zombie_uncrab.description: Controls headcrab detachment behavior from zombies.

track_health.description: If true, spawning depends on damage dealt. Otherwise always spawns with full health

deathdrop.title: Death drop
deathdrop.description: Entity classname to spawn. Empty string means no drop chance. 'grenade' is a special name and will spawn a timed grenade.

aiming_lasers.title: Aiming lasers
aiming_lasers.description: Controls laser aiming visuals for monsters.

interval.title: Think rate
interval.description: Internal think rate interval. the lower the value the more cpu usage

interval.title: Think rate
interval.description: Internal think rate interval. the lower the value the more cpu usage

throw_flash_cooldown.description: Global cooldown for blackops to throw grenades

detonate_time.description: Time, in seconds, at which the flashbang will detonate since it's thrown.

interval.title: Think rate
interval.description: Internal think rate interval. the lower the value the more cpu usage

capacity.description: Max sentry spawn capacity per engineer

distance.description: Distance from the engineer to spawn

cooldown_start.description: Time until engineer can place a sentry after spawning

cooldown_combat.description: How often to try to drop a sentry in combat, in seconds

cooldown_idle.description: How often to try to drop a sentry while idle/roaming, in seconds

chance.description: Chance to drop a sentry while idle/roaming, in percentage 0-100

recharge_time.description: Time (In seconds) required to fully recharge. 0 means never recharge

max_leap_z.description: Panther won't pounce at enemies if they're higher up than this from the panther's location

min_leap.description: Panther won't pounce at enemies within this range

max_leap.description: Panther won't pounce at enemies beyond this range

classify.description: Classification used for the character, See: https://github.com/Mikk155/bts_rc/wiki/characters#playable-characters

hands.description: View model hands used for the character, See: https://github.com/Mikk155/bts_rc/wiki/characters#player-view-hands
